prompt:
A glass aquarium pane is shown close-up with a vertical stick-on thermometer strip adhered to the outside, its colored segments faintly visible but too small to read. Inside the tank, plants and a few small fish swim against a softly lit background, and the waterline is clearly visible above the thermometer position. The strip shows a gentle highlighted band in the mid-range, implying a temperature somewhere in the 0–50 °C range without exposing a specific value.

The setting is a near-future solarpunk living space with soft natural light, additional houseplants around the aquarium, and minimal, clean decor in the blurred background. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or legible text on the strip or equipment, and a composition that focuses on the thermometer strip and nearby glass while the rest of the tank and room remain softly out of focus, emphasizing quick visual checks of aquarium temperature.
